services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Python, Django, FastAPI, REST API development, authentication, and database integration.

services.title: Full Stack Web Development
services.description: End-to-end web applications using Django, React, Tailwind CSS, and MySQL.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Cross-platform mobile apps using React Native with Firebase and API integration.

services.title: AI / ML Integration
services.description: Image similarity, AI-based matching systems, and ML model integration with backend APIs.

services.title: Database Design
services.description: MySQL schema design, optimization, query writing, and backend data modeling.

testimonials.title: Great Quality Work
testimonials.body: Mohammad showed strong problem-solving skills and implemented backend APIs efficiently using Django. His understanding of REST principles and database design is solid for a junior developer.

testimonials.title: Reliable and Dedicated
testimonials.body: Worked with Mohammad during his internship. He delivered features on time and was proactive in learning React and React Native while working on real-world projects.

testimonials.title: Strong Learning Ability
testimonials.body: Mohammad quickly adapted to our codebase and contributed to backend and frontend tasks. His willingness to learn AI-based systems like image matching stood out.

education.description: Pursuing BCA with a focus on software development, data structures, web technologies, and database systems. Worked on academic projects involving Python, Django, React, and MySQL.
Completed a structured Android development course covering Java basics, Android UI components, activities, intents, and simple CRUD apps.
Learned SQL fundamentals including SELECT queries, joins, aggregations, and basic database design concepts using relational databases.

workHistory.description: Worked as a React Native trainee on mobile application development. Implemented screens, navigation flows, API integrations, and basic state management while collaborating with senior developers.
Developed and maintained PHP-based web modules, worked with MySQL databases, fixed bugs, and learned about MVC patterns and server-side development.
Built full-stack projects like a Lost & Found portal using Django, React Native, and AI-based image matching. Worked on REST APIs, authentication, and integration with Firebase and Twilio.

projects.title: LostSync - AI Powered Lost & Found Portal
projects.description: Full stack lost & found portal using Django, React Native, and AI-based image similarity to match lost and found items with Twilio and Firebase integration.

projects.title: Blood Donation App
projects.description: React Native app to connect donors and recipients with real-time updates, authentication, and notifications.

projects.title: MobiGarage - Two Wheeler Service Platform
projects.description: Platform for booking two-wheeler services online, with separate flows for garages and customers.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Responsive developer portfolio built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS, featuring dynamic sections driven by JSON.

projects.title: Django REST API Boilerplate
projects.description: Reusable Django REST API boilerplate with JWT auth, role-based access, and MySQL integration.

blogs.title: Building an AI-Based Lost & Found System with Django & React Native
blogs.description: A walkthrough of how I built LostSync using Django, React Native, and image similarity models to match lost and found items with notifications.

blogs.title: Getting Started with Django REST Framework for Beginners
blogs.description: A simple guide to building clean REST APIs in Django, covering serializers, viewsets, authentication, and basic best practices.

blogs.title: React Native + Firebase: Building Real-Time Mobile Apps
blogs.description: How I used React Native and Firebase for authentication, real-time updates, and push-like behaviour in mobile projects.

blogs.title: My Stack for a Modern Developer Portfolio (Vite, React, Tailwind)
blogs.description: Why I chose Vite, React, and Tailwind CSS to build a fast and responsive portfolio with dynamic content driven by JSON.
